source_reference.title_en: Low Current Systems for Electrical Power Engineers
source_reference.label_ar: المرجع في أنظمة التيار الخفيف، أ. د. محمود جيلاني، 2020
source_reference.label_en: Low Current Systems for Electrical Power Engineers, Prof. Mahmoud Gilany, 2020

extraction_policy: No public page should copy PDF paragraphs. Concepts are paraphrased into design, site, testing, warning, and visual-decision fields.

integration_templates.design_ar: ابدأ المشروع بتحديد scope لكل نظام، غرفه، متطلبات التغذية والـ UPS، ومسؤوليات التنسيق مع المعماري والميكانيكا والكهرباء.
integration_templates.design_en: Start by defining each system scope, rooms, power and UPS needs, and coordination responsibilities with architecture, mechanical, and electrical teams.
integration_templates.site_ar: في الموقع، اربط كل ملاحظة بمكان واضح: room، rack، riser، drawing revision، وسبب التأثير على نظام آخر.
integration_templates.site_en: On site, tie each note to a clear room, rack, riser, drawing revision, and the affected adjacent system.
integration_templates.test_ar: التسليم الجيد يجمع expected result، actual evidence، reference drawing، واسم المسؤول عن المراجعة.
integration_templates.test_en: Good handover records expected result, actual evidence, reference drawing, and responsible reviewer.
mistakes: Using early estimates as final load values without checking selected equipment datasheets.
Coordinating rooms late after architecture and MEP layouts are frozen.

integration_templates.design_ar: صمم الشبكة كمنظومة قابلة للتوسع: عدد outlets، حجم patch panels، rack space، switch ports، PoE/UPS، ومسار copper/fiber.
integration_templates.design_en: Design the network as an expandable system: outlets, patch panels, rack space, switch ports, PoE/UPS, and copper/fiber pathways.
integration_templates.site_ar: تحقق من labels، مسار الكابل، bend radius، طول copper channel، ترتيب patch cords، وتهوية الراك قبل الاختبار.
integration_templates.site_en: Check labels, cable route, bend radius, copper channel length, patch-cord dressing, and rack ventilation before testing.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر wiremap/length/loss للنحاس وOTDR أو loss budget للفايبر، ثم اربط النتيجة برقم outlet أو fiber core.
integration_templates.test_en: Test copper wiremap/length/loss and fiber OTDR or loss budget, then tie each result to outlet or fiber-core ID.
mistakes: Sizing switches and patch panels for the current outlet count only, with no spare capacity.
Treating fire alarm as a normal data-network subsystem instead of life-safety infrastructure.
visual_ideas: rack elevation with patch panel, switch, PDU, and cable organizers

integration_templates.design_ar: ابدأ BMS من point list واضح: نوع النقطة AI/AO/DI/DO، range، مكان sensor/actuator، sequence، alarms، trends، والـ protocol.
integration_templates.design_en: Start BMS from a clear point list: AI/AO/DI/DO type, range, sensor/actuator location, sequence, alarms, trends, and protocol.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع wiring داخل LCP، اتجاه actuator، مكان sensor، addressing، shielding، وتطابق graphic مع الجهاز الحقيقي.
integration_templates.site_en: Check LCP wiring, actuator direction, sensor placement, addressing, shielding, and graphic-to-field matching.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر calibration، manual command، auto sequence، alarm limits، trend logging، وفشل الاتصال ثم recovery.
integration_templates.test_en: Test calibration, manual command, automatic sequence, alarm limits, trend logging, communication failure, and recovery.
mistakes: Counting points without defining ranges, units, and command authority.
Commissioning graphics before proving field wiring and sequence behavior.
visual_ideas: AHU control loop with sensor, DDC, actuator, and feedback

integration_templates.design_ar: حدد هل النظام traditional، IP، أو hybrid؛ ثم اربط ذلك بالكابلات، MDF/IDF، numbering plan، gateways، والـ power/network needs.
integration_templates.design_en: Decide whether the system is traditional, IP, or hybrid, then align cabling, MDF/IDF, numbering plan, gateways, and power/network needs.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع termination في MDF/IDF، labels، نوع outlet، VLAN للصوت، QoS، وPoE للـ IP phones.
integration_templates.site_en: Check MDF/IDF terminations, labels, outlet type, voice VLAN, QoS, and PoE for IP phones.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر internal calls، external calls، transfer، emergency routing، caller ID، recording أو billing إن وجدت.
integration_templates.test_en: Test internal calls, external calls, transfer, emergency routing, caller ID, and recording or billing when required.
mistakes: Mixing analog and IP endpoint assumptions in the same outlet schedule.
Ignoring voice VLAN/QoS and then blaming the handset for poor call quality.

integration_templates.design_ar: صمم المسار حسب level budget: مصدر الإشارة، headend، amplifier gain، splitter/tap loss، cable loss، ومستوى الإشارة عند outlet.
integration_templates.design_en: Design the path around the level budget: source, headend, amplifier gain, splitter/tap loss, cable loss, and outlet signal level.
integration_templates.site_ar: افحص connector quality، اتجاه tap/splitter، power للـ active devices، grounding، وترتيب coax داخل الراك.
integration_templates.site_en: Inspect connector quality, tap/splitter direction, power for active devices, grounding, and coax dressing inside the rack.
integration_templates.test_ar: سجل RF/IF level، quality، channel scan، picture/audio result، أو multicast stability في IPTV.
integration_templates.test_en: Record RF/IF level, quality, channel scan, picture/audio result, or IPTV multicast stability.
mistakes: Adding splitters without recalculating downstream loss.
Treating IPTV as RF distribution instead of network capacity, multicast, and endpoint configuration.

integration_templates.design_ar: ابدأ من door schedule: reader type، lock type، REX، door contact، fire release، access levels، والـ fail-safe/fail-secure decision.
integration_templates.design_en: Start from the door schedule: reader type, lock type, REX, door contact, fire release, access levels, and fail-safe/fail-secure decision.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع اتجاه الباب، alignment للقفل، cable cores، polarity، location للـ REX، labels، وربط fire alarm release.
integration_templates.site_en: Check door swing, lock alignment, cable cores, polarity, REX location, labels, and fire-alarm release interface.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر valid/denied card، REX، forced/held open، fire release، battery backup، event log، وtime schedule.
integration_templates.test_en: Test valid/denied cards, REX, forced/held-open, fire release, battery backup, event log, and time schedule.
mistakes: Designing the reader without coordinating lock power and egress/fire release.
Testing access granted only, while ignoring denied access and alarm states.

integration_templates.design_ar: اربط كل room وbed بمحطة المريض، corridor indication، nurse station، escalation rules، integration، والـ power/network backup.
integration_templates.design_en: Map each room and bed to patient station, corridor indication, nurse station, escalation rules, integration, and backed-up power/network.
integration_templates.site_ar: تأكد من location عند السرير والحمام، visibility للمبة الممر، labels، cable/network، ومطابقة room numbers.
integration_templates.site_en: Verify bed and bathroom station locations, corridor-lamp visibility, labels, cable/network, and room-number mapping.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر call، cancel، assistance، emergency، escalation، display، reports، وفشل الشبكة أو التغذية.
integration_templates.test_en: Test call, cancel, assistance, emergency, escalation, display, reports, and network or power failure.
mistakes: Mapping room numbers late, causing nurse-station displays to disagree with architecture.
Testing only the call button without cancellation and escalation behavior.

integration_templates.design_ar: صمم CCTV من هدف المشهد: identification/detection، FOV، lens، resolution، lighting، bitrate، storage retention، network، وVMS users.
integration_templates.design_en: Design CCTV from the scene objective: identification/detection, FOV, lens, resolution, lighting, bitrate, retention storage, network, and VMS users.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع mounting، aiming، focus، cable/PoE، weather rating، reflections، night mode، وتنظيف العدسة.
integration_templates.site_en: Check mounting, aiming, focus, cable/PoE, weather rating, reflections, night mode, and lens cleaning access.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر live view، playback، export، day/night، motion/VCA، time sync، user permissions، وstorage estimate.
integration_templates.test_en: Test live view, playback, export, day/night, motion/VCA, time sync, user permissions, and storage estimate.
mistakes: Choosing megapixels without checking FOV and pixel density at the target.
Calculating storage without bitrate, frame rate, codec, retention, and motion assumptions.

integration_templates.design_ar: ابدأ من الكود والغرض: detector type/spacing، zones، loop loading، NAC loading، battery، cause-and-effect، وinterfaces مع أنظمة أخرى.
integration_templates.design_en: Start from code and purpose: detector type/spacing, zones, loop loading, NAC loading, battery, cause-and-effect, and interfaces with other systems.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع address labels، cable rating، polarity، isolators، module wiring، detector location، وموانع false alarm.
integration_templates.site_en: Check address labels, cable rating, polarity, isolators, module wiring, detector location, and false-alarm risks.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر alarm، fault، supervisory، notification، cause/effect، battery، reset/disable، والتوثيق الموقع.
integration_templates.test_en: Test alarm, fault, supervisory, notification, cause/effect, battery, reset/disable, and site evidence.
mistakes: Selecting detector type without considering environment and false-alarm sources.
Treating zones and notification zones as the same design decision.

integration_templates.design_ar: صمم PA من zone وSPL/STI target: noise level، speaker type/tap، spacing، amplifier load، priorities، وemergency override.
integration_templates.design_en: Design PA from zone and SPL/STI targets: noise level, speaker type/tap, spacing, amplifier load, priorities, and emergency override.
integration_templates.site_ar: راجع speaker tap، polarity، line routing، amplifier channels، labels، feedback risk، ومكان microphone.
integration_templates.site_en: Check speaker tap, polarity, line routing, amplifier channels, labels, feedback risk, and microphone location.
integration_templates.test_ar: اختبر SPL/STI، zone selection، priority override، fault monitoring، clipping، feedback، وbackup operation.
integration_templates.test_en: Test SPL/STI, zone selection, priority override, fault monitoring, clipping, feedback, and backup operation.
mistakes: Selecting amplifier power without summing speaker taps and spare margin.
Ignoring room acoustics, causing feedback or poor intelligibility despite enough wattage.

groups.chapter: Codes, standards, testing, commissioning, and handover

integration_templates.design_ar: كل standard أو specification يجب أن يتحول إلى acceptance criteria قابلة للاختبار وليست مجرد اسم في المستند.
integration_templates.design_en: Every standard or specification must become testable acceptance criteria, not just a named reference.
integration_templates.site_ar: التنفيذ المقبول يعتمد على approved revision، material submittal، site condition، ومسار واضح للـ NCR أو punch item.
integration_templates.site_en: Accepted work depends on approved revision, material submittal, site condition, and a clear NCR or punch-item path.
integration_templates.test_ar: اجعل كل test sheet يربط النظام، المكان، الجهاز، النتيجة، الصورة أو القراءة، والتوقيع.
integration_templates.test_en: Each test sheet should connect system, location, asset, result, photo or reading, and signature.
mistakes: Writing generic pass/fail without evidence.
Using specifications without mapping clauses to drawings, BOQ, and test records.
